page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool for the analysis of transcriptional regulation that allows you to compare a set of position weight matrices (PWM) against the T-Reg database (a collection of PWMs built from Transfac and Jaspar).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool for the analysis of transcriptional regulation that allows you to compare a set of position weight matrices (PWM) against the T-Reg database (a collection of PWMs built from Transfac and Jaspar).
